productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Navy Blue Shoes
description: A contemporary style-twist on a classic design - the roll-down detail at the mouth makes this shoe a love-forever classic. You can button down the roll-up detail or extend the mid-top to make it a high-top desert boot! Your shoe closet is incomplete without a brilliant piece like this shoe moreover, the quality of materials used ensures its durability so it's money well-spent!UpperSoft leather upper with three hole lace ups and mid-top stylingButton down roll-up detail at the mothContrast stitch detail and print on the lateral side of the midfootBlunt toe cupUpper adhered to the outsoleOutsoleThick and tough rubber outsole with branded grooves on the forefootShoe careWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
